summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all 9 production flow audit bug fixes in Garment ERP v8.0. All critical validation logic is working correctly and variance feature remains fully functional.
passed_tests: C-1: Buyer shipment quantity caps - validation logic active with Indonesian error messages
C-2: Production return quantity caps - correctly validates max returnable with Indonesian messages
C-3: Job total_shipped_to_buyer query - fields present and calculated correctly
H-1: PO remaining_qty_to_ship clamped at 0 and over_shipped_qty field added
H-2: Auto REQ-RPL for missing materials - material requests endpoint functional
H-3: Production progress respects defect-adjusted capacity - validation active
H-4: Reject negative return_qty - correctly rejects 0 and negative quantities
M-1: Reject 0-qty dispatch - correctly validates minimum 1 pcs requirement
M-3: Admin defect report derives vendor_id from job - validation logic implemented
Variance feature integrity - OVERPRODUCTION and UNDERPRODUCTION endpoints fully functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% - All 9 production flow audit bug fixes verified working correctly
